hypothesis: A GraphSAGE-based mixture predictor augmented with explicit learned pairwise edge embeddings, trained only on pre-trained single-gas predictors and binary-mixture PBM data, will predict etching rates of unseen ternary gas mixtures (e.g., Ar/O2/N2) across the same power (50–2000 W) and pressure (10–70 mTorr) ranges with R2 ≥ 0.90 relative to PBM-generated ground truth without retraining the single-gas networks.
